S.FORM: = Edgar Lungu = Mntucing hngkawas 1956 idas 11 jiyax 11 ka Edgar Lungu ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Zambia ta sayang o kiya ka Edgar Lungu, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 1 jiyax 25 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ədgaɾ luŋu = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka ədgaɾ luŋu ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan *ambia ta sajaŋ o kija ka ədgaɾ luŋu, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
S.FORM: = Edgar Lungu = Mntucing hngkawas 1956 idas 11 jiyax 11 ka Edgar Lungu ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Zambia ta sayang o kiya ka Edgar Lungu, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 1 jiyax 25 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
